speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri aukaat dikha di, tabhi se mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Gaon mein Monsoon fail hone se Papa ki fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai, shaayad isiliye mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai aur thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi. Metro city mein akele baith kar ye sir dard thik nahi ho raha, lagta hai dimaag fat jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate the Seeker by directly mirroring their exact body complaint using Lens A.
text: Tumhare sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, aur is akelepan mein sharir ki ye thakan jhelna bohot bhaari pad raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir bilkul toot raha hai
text: Haan, dimaag fatne ko ho raha hai. Boss ne aise baat ki jaise main koi keeda hoon jisko kuch nahi aata. Yahan room par akele thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi aur wahan gaon mein Papa ki chinta alag maar rahi hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence of failing both at work and for his family using Lens E.
text: Yahan ki insult aur wahan parivar ka dabaav, in dono ke beech apne aap ko sabit na kar paane ka darr satane lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Darr toh hai ki agar meri aisi performance se naukri gayi toh Sahukaar gaon mein ghar pe aake meri aur Papa ki izzat uchhal dega. Biradari mein kya muh dikhayenge hum? Pata nahi ye headache kab jayega, mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To softly respond to the stigma cue about izzat and biradari with a short pause using Lens B.
text: Izzat bachaane ki is zimmedari mein dimaag aur sharir dono jawab de rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir bilkul toot raha hai
text: Thak gaya hoon main. Ek toh ye badi city, yahan koi apna nahi hai jisse do baat kar sakun. Boss ki baatein aur gaon ka karz, bas yahi ghoom raha hai 24 ghante. Sharir bilkul toot raha hai meri is akelepan mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the isolation and lack of relational support in the big city using Lens C.
text: Akele is bade shehar mein bina kisi apne ke, in pareshaniyon ko chupchaap jhelna is dard ko aur bhi gehra kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi
text: Sahi baat hai, koi poochne wala nahi hai yahan. Khana khud banao, kaam pe sabke samne gaaliyan khao, phir PG pe aake wahi sir ka dard seho. Kabhi kabhi khud pe sharam aati hai ki main itni mehnat karke bhi Papa ka karz chuka nahi pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To gently prompt deeper emotional exploration after sufficient restatements.
text: Jab ek taraf naukri mein beizzati ho aur doosri taraf ghar walo ko support na kar paane ka khayal aaye, toh andar kaisa mehsoos hota hai us waqt?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se lagta hai ki main zindagi mein totally fail ho chuka hoon. Boss ke samne jab aukaat dikhai gayi toh laga jaise main phasa hua hoon. Karz aur fasal ki wajah se gaon wapas bhi nahi ja sakta. Yeh helplessness mujhse bardaasht nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the deep exhaustion and feeling of being trapped by naming it directly.
text: Lagta hai tum apne parivar ke liye is shehar mein mehnat karte hue buri tarah thak chuke ho, aur dono taraf se khud ko phasa hua mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Haan, main poori tarah fasa hua hoon. Aur is dabaav ki wajah se mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Aisa lagta hai ki ye sir dard aur failure ka ehsaas mujhe andar se khaa jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize his distress given the systemic issues of rural debt and urban isolation, validating his worth.
text: Tumhara aise laachaar aur pareshan mehsoos karna bilkul samajh aata hai, khaaskar jab mausam ki maar aur sahukaar ka dabaav ek sath ho, par boss ki baaton se tumhare barson ki lagan aur parivar ke liye ki gayi mehnat ki keemat kam nahi ho jaati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad tum theek keh rahe ho. Par jab office mein aukaat dikhai jati hai toh khud pe shak hone lagta hai. Mera dhyan bas sahukaar aur baaki cheezon pe ghoom raha tha isliye meeting mein thoda gadbad ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To use an anecdote to normalize the specific pressure migrant breadwinners face, reducing shame.
text: Bade shehar aakar ghar walon ka karz aur bojh akele uthane walon mein yeh focus bhatakna aur thakan bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi mard asani se bolega nahi kyunki sabko bahar se successful aur strong hi dikhna hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat boli tumne. Yahan har koi apni life perfect dikhane mein laga hai, aur meri life yahan is chote se room mein ghut rahi hai. Par mujhe is sab se bahar aana hai, batao kya karoon main ab?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To give simple, low-effort actionable options that respect his lack of time and energy.
text: Do chhote kadam le sakte hain abhi jisse thoda aaram mile: ya toh sir ke dard ke liye agle 5 minute sab kuch band karke aankh band kar lo, ya phir apni pareshaniyon ko paper pe likh do taaki dimaag ka bojh thoda halka ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aankh band karke thodi der akele baithne wala idea theek lag raha hai mujhe. Par darr lagta hai ki khali baithunga toh aur zyada overthinking hogi fasal, boss aur EMI ke baare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To break down the chosen suggestion step-by-step so it feels manageable and safe.
text: Pehle phone ko apne bistar se door table par rakh do… phir ek lambi saans lekar bas agle 5 minute tak aane waale khayalon ko aane do, unse ladaai mat karo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir bilkul toot raha hai
text: Theek hai, main ye koshish karunga. Par sach bataun, sahukaar wali baat andar se jati nahi. Papa wahan gaon mein tension mein hain aur main yahan metro mein. Sharir bilkul toot raha hai meri is bebus halat ki wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reframe his feeling of inadequacy as a systemic agricultural and economic issue, lifting personal blame.
text: Kisaano par karz aur mausam ki maar kisi ek parivar ki galti nahi hoti, yeh gaon aur shehar ke beech us system ka dabaav hai jo tum apne sir akele uthane ki koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh wahi hai na. Par apne samaj mein log hume hi nakara samajhte hain agar time pe byaj na diya jaye. Mere dimag mein bas yahi sharam bhari hui hai ki main bete ka farz theek se nahi nibha pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To gently mirror his long-standing struggle of supporting his family against stigma, honoring the soft pause.
text: Itne saalo se family ko bachaane ke liye akele ladte rehna, aur phir bhi khud ko nakara mehsoos karna...

speaker: Seeker
text: Lad toh raha hoon poori himmat se. Pichle teen saal se Diwali par gaon nahi gaya kyunki train ki ticket ke paise bachakar karz ki EMI bharni hoti hai. Aur uske baad yahan boss aukaat dikha raha hai meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To praise his extreme sacrifices, reminding him of his actual strength and dedication.
text: Teen saal tak apne tyohar aur khushiyan chhod kar bas apne parivar ko aage rakhna tumhari bohot badi sachhi taakat dikhata hai, jo kisi meeting ke nateeje se nahi aanki ja sakti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Taakat ka kya karun jab body hi dhokha de rahi hai. Mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, aisa lagta hai is thakan aur dard ke sath hi poori life nikal jayegi meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror his fear of living with permanent pain and fatigue using Lens E.
text: Dard ko ab apni baaki zindagi ka hissa maan lene ka darr andar ghar kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Par waise main soch raha hoon ki kal boss se ek baar akele mein baat karun jab wo theek mood mein ho. Samjhaun usko ki mera dhyan fasal ki wajah se bhatka tha, taaki wo thoda samjhe baat ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect his proactive shift in addressing his duties at work using Lens B.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the relational navigation between the boss and the moneylender using Lens C.
text: Naukri bachane ki majboori aur karz ka samay badhane ke liye sahukaar se baat, dono taraf se ab raste nikalne ki koshish shuru ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi
text: Sahi kaha. Akele itna fasa hua tha, ab thoda clear lag raha hai dimaag aage ke liye. Ye jo thakan thi, baat karke usme thodi si raahat mehsus ho rahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To contrast his initial somatic pain with his current sense of relief using Lens A.
text: Dimaag ka thoda shant hona aur is lagatar thakan se raahat milna, sach mein apne aap mein ek badlaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dhanyawad. Main waise kisi se itna khul ke bolta nahi yahan is PG mein. Sab apne laptop aur office mein mast hain. Aaj apni andar ki sharam ko thoda bahar nikalne ka mauka mil gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate his courage in breaking his silence despite the isolating culture around him.
text: Apne mann ki baat bina kisi darr ke keh pana, aur itne akelepan mein bhi apne dard ko aawaaz dena, bahut himmat ka kaam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya bhai. Abhi ke liye main bed pe jate waqt wo 5 minute saans lene wala kaam karta hoon, taaki neend theek se aaye aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reinforce his choice to take a brief moment of rest using Lens D.
text: Aaj raat thoda samay apne sharir ko dena, aage ki chinta kiye bina, waqai sukoon bhara hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ummeed toh yahi hai. Kal subah office bhi jana hai aur boss se baat karni hai fresh dimaag se. Chalte hain, thank you dobara meri halat samjhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To wish him well as he steps back into his breadwinner duties using Lens B.
text: Kal ki ek nayi subah aur ghar walon ke liye tumhari is lajawaab mehnat ke safar ke liye meri taraf se bahot shubhkamnayein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai
text: Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Papa ne kisan hokar karz lekar mujhe shehar bheja tha par ab crop failure se remittance ruk gayi hai, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe raat bhar neend nahi aati. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur language gap ki wajah se yahan Bangalore mein kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic complaint exactly without jumping to solutions.
text: Aap keh rahe hain ki chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki saans tak theek se lena mushkil ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Haan bhaiya, bas ghutan hoti hai. Meeting mein English mein sunaya boss ne, mujhe aadhi baat samajh nahi aayi. Papa ne udhaar lekar bheja tha, soch rahe the beta paisa bhejega, par yahan mera khud ka rent dena mushkil ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role framing.
text: Apne ghar ka sahara banne ke liye aur unka karz chukane ki jo badi zimmedari hai, woh aap akele utha rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh hi toh hai. Fasal kharab hone ki khabar sunkar dil aur ghabrane laga. Gaon mein sab kya bolenge agar main wapas chala gaya khali haath? Raat bhar yahi soch kar aankein khuli rehti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration of this distress.
text: Jab se khet mein nuksan ki baat aur remittance rukne ki pareshani shuru hui hai, tab se aapka aaram aur raaton ki neend puri tarah chhin gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Sukoon toh kabka chala gaya. Yahan bhasha ki problem itni hai ki PG mein bhi kisi se theek se baat nahi hoti. Akela pada rehta hoon aur darr ke mare chhati mein jakdan lagatar hoti rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the impact of isolation on his physical symptoms without jumping to solutions.
text: Is anjaan shehar ke akelepan aur bhasha ki rukawat ke beech, jab yeh dard aur ghabrahat badhti hai, toh aapka dimaag sabse zyada kya sochta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Bata nahi sakta kitna mushkil hai. Kabhi kabhi toh chest tightness itna badh jata hai ki lagta hai bas balkani se kood jaoon, toh is roz-roz ki zillat aur udhaari ke chakkar se ek hi baar mein hamesha ke liye chhutkara mil jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the moderate risk flag directly by holding space for the pain and completing the mandatory safety protocol.
text: Yeh roz ki beizzati aur karz ka dard itna asahniye ho gaya hai ki kabhi kabhi aage badhne ki jagah sab kuch khatam kar dena hi ek rasta lagne lagta hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Haan bhaiya abhi main theek hoon... bas himmat toot jati hai kabhi kabhi. Papa ka thaka hua chehra yaad aata hai toh ruk jata hoon. Par akele mein yeh chest tightness bahut dard deti hai aur ro bhi nahi pata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate safety and mirror the relational connection that keeps him going.
text: Sun kar tasalli hui ki aap apne pita ke chehre aur unse judi bhavnaon ko yaad kar ke is mushkil waqt mein khud ko sambhale hue hain, bhale hi andar se sehne ki taqat khatam ho rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Core mudda wahi hai ki unko aur dukh nahi de sakta, par remittance bhej nahi pa raha kyunki meri khud ki aamdani idhar udhar kharch ho rahi hai. Main bilkul trapped mehsoos kar raha hoon is poore cycle mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the physical and emotional exhaustion of the duty burden.
text: Lagta hai is akelepan mein ghar ki aarthik zimmedari aur karz uthate uthate aap andar se puri tarah thak chuke hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot thak gaya hoon bhaiya. Par agar gaon mein kisine sun liya ki kisan ka launda shehar me aakar darr gaya, toh biradari mein bahut bada mazaak ban jayega. Ye saari pareshani isliye chupana hi padti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma gently with a brief restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Dusron ki nazron mein girne aur biradari ke taano ke darr se, aap apna yeh dard sabse chhipa kar daba rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Haan, bas dikhawa karna padta hai roz. Subah office jao, wahan langugage gap ki zillat saho, aur wapas aakar apne kamre mein chhati mein jakdan bardasht karo. Yahi zindagi ban gayi hai meri shehar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the migrant struggle and language barrier to reduce his self-blame.
text: Jo helplessness aap mehsoos kar rahe hain, woh bahut swabhavik hai. Bade naye shehar mein akele rehkar corporate ka dabav aur piche gaon ke karz ko ek sath uthana kisi ke liye bhi bahut bhari hai, is bhasha ki rukawat mein aapki koi niji kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad koi kami nahi hai par boss ko toh lagta hai main bekaar hoon. Unki fluent English ke aage main dar jata hoon, kuch theek bolne ka try karta hoon toh bas saans hi atakne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote from the migrant worker context.
text: Hamare in naye bade sheharon mein corporate environment mein aane wale bahut se logon ke beech yeh bhasha ka darr bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin aapas mein koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabko apna image aur naukri bachani hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, naukri chhut gayi toh log papa ko jeene nahi denge. Waise bhi remittance nahi jane se sahukar aur aas-pados wale ghar par aakar bahut taane marte honge. Wahi unka darr mujhe yahan mar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time element of how long this fear has been eating at him.
text: Pichle kuch dino se sahukar ke dabaav aur ghar walon ki izzat ka yahi darr aapko har pal din-raat kha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Wahi saara bojh meri saans rok deta hai. Main kisi bhi haal mein nahi chahta ki meri wajah se mere parivaar ko udhar gaon mein wo zillat dekhni pade, jaisi main yahan roj shehar mein jhelta hoon. Isi se hi chest tightness aur badh gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Move towards action phase by asking what might offer a small bit of grounding or relief.
text: Abhi ke is muskhil waqt mein, jab aapko lagta hai ki saara dabav saans par asar kar raha hai, toh thodi der ke liye hi sahi, kaun si aisi choti si cheez hai jo aapko thoda thehrav de sakti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhaiya mujhe abhi sacchi nahi samajh aa raha. Par main waqai theek hona chahta hoon taaki office mein kaam dhyan se kar sakun aur kam se kam rent nikal kar unhe paise bhej sakun. Aap batao main abhi kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide simple somatic grounding options suitable for his space.
text: Is ghutan ko thoda kam karne ke do chhote aur aasan tarike ho sakte hain. Ya toh jab bhi meeting ke baad ghabrahat badhe, aap ek glass thanda paani pi kar 5 minute sirf apni aati-jaati saans par dhyan de sakte hain, ya phir abhi apne PG mein thande paani se chehra dho kar chupchap 10 minute let sakte hain. Inme se aaj ke liye kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chehra dho kar letne wala idea kar sakta hoon main abhi. Room mein aaj akela hi hoon aur mujhe us aaram ki jarurat bhi mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the chosen coping step sequentially.
text: Toh pehle yeh karo, ek dum thande paani se apna chehra aur gardan ache se dho lo, phir aakar bistar par seedhe let jao, aankhein band karo aur dheere-dheere lambi saans lo… bas itna hi aaj raat ke liye khud ko karne do.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his sense of duty that caused the pressure.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his courage to face the structural struggles.

strategy_intent: Mirror his proactive relational step.

strategy_intent: Mirror the timeframe shift towards the future.

speaker: Supporter

strategy_intent: Mirror the exact bodily complaint to validate the somatic experience before probing the stressor.
text: Tumhare pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai, aur boss ke chillane ke baad se jo yeh sharir kaanpna aur kamzori shuru hui hai, woh EMI bounce hone ke darr se aur bhi badh gayi lagti hai.

text: Haan bhai, dawai li par kuch farq nahi pada. Pura din office mein aisi halat rehti hai, lagta hai chakkar kha ke gir jaunga. Ek taraf kisan credit card ka paisa aur dusri taraf is naye shehar ka rent, samajh nahi aata kya karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address mild risk with a warm normalising line, then mirror the duration of the physical toll.
text: Aisi double tension mein chakkar aana ya ghabrahat hona bahut swabhavik hai. Pichle kuch dino se lagatar kisan credit card aur room rent ke is bojh ko akele uthate hue tumhara sharir sach mein bahut thak gaya hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan to itni hai ki pucho mat. Par gaon mein kisi ko bata nahi sakta ki main yahan kitna pareshan hoon. Is metro isolation mein hazaron log hain, par mera apna koi nahi jisse dard bol saku. Sabko lagta hai beta city mein successful hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement only, ending with a soft pause, mirroring relational isolation.
text: Sabki nazaron mein kamyaab dikhne ki majboori aur is anjaan bheed mein apna dard akele sehna sach mein bahut akelapan deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Wahi akelapan andar hi andar kha raha hai mujhe. Aur upar se boss ka daily pressure. Kal jab usne sabke samne sunaya, to wahi pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan fir se itni tez hui ki main washroom mein ja ke rote rote bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe deeper into the core conflict after multiple restatements.
text: Jab office mein itne logon ke beech woh bardaasht karna padta hai, tab us dard ke pal mein sabse zyada darr kis cheez ka lagta hai tumhe?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse bada darr yahi hai ki agar naukri chali gayi to bank wale ghar aa jayenge aur gaon mein meri family ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Main unhe ye zillat nahi jhelne de sakta, par mera sharir ab bilkul sath nahi de raha is shahar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feeling of being trapped and exhausted by the financial debt and duty to family.
text: Lagta hai is kisan credit card ke udhaar aur parivaar ki izzat bachane ke chakkar mein tum puri tarah se phans gaye ho, jahan aaram ka koi rasta nahi bacha aur isiliye yeh poori thakan aur bebasi ab sidha tumhare sharir par asar kar rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bol rahe ho aap. Main buri tarah phans gaya hoon. Din raat bas calculations chalti rehti hain dimaag mein. Kab loan utrega, kab thoda chain milega. Meri neend puri tarah udh chuki hai in kharcho ke chakkar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize his worry as culturally valid for migrant workers carrying family debt.
text: Jo fikar tum kar rahe ho, wo bahut se migrating mardon ka dard hai jo apna gaon chod kar kamane aate hain; apne ghar ki izzat aur EMI ko lekar tumhari itni chinta tumhari zimmedari ka ehsaas dikhati hai, yeh neend na aana tumhari koi kami nahi balki in halaton ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari to hai, par kya karun jab body hi chhod rahi ho sath? Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod ke bas train pakdu aur bhag jaun wapas. Par fir baapu ka udas chehra yaad aata hai aur sharam aati hai apni soch par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement, ending with soft pause, mirroring relational conflict.
text: Aise bhari dabav mein, jab ek taraf ghar wapas jane ka mann kare aur dusri taraf baapu ki takleef ka sochna pade, toh apne hi do raaston ke beech sharam mehsoos hona laazmi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir kaanpta rehta hai
text: Haan, wahi sharam aur bhatkaw hai. Ek taraf boss ki gaaliyan, dusri taraf udhaar. Isliye mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai tension se aur mujhe aur bhi helplessness feel hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalizing the physical toll of migrant debt.
text: Metro cities mein aakar parivaar ke liye udhaar chukane walo mein tension se yeh sharir ka kaanpna bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi pardesi asani se bolega nahi kyunki izzat ki baatein sab kholi mein chupate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein koi nahi bolta. Sab andar daba ke rakhte hain meri tarah. Par ab kya karoon main? Agar aisi hi haalat rahi toh main na yahan tik paunga na wahan. Mujhe batao is thakan aur ghabrahat se nikalne ka koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide two culturally syntonic, brief options to manage somatic anxiety during work.
text: Aisi ghabrahat ko thoda shant karne ke liye hum do chhote kadam dekh sakte hain. Pehla, kya tum office mein washroom break ke waqt 5 minute akele muh dho kar gahri saanse le sakte ho? Ya dusra, duty ke baad room par sirf 10 minute purane gaano ko sun kar thoda sa dhyan bhatka sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Room par ja kar to dimaag aur kharab hota hai akelepan mein. Washroom wala idea theek lag raha hai. Wahan mujhe koi disturb bhi nahi karega boss ki chik-chik ke beech, paani se shayad jalan kam lage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen washroom grounding exercise step-by-step.
text: Washroom wala rasta chunna bilkul samajhdari ki baat hai. Pehle toh wahan akele jao, nalke ka thanda pani apne chehre par dalo... phir aankhein band karke sirf us thandak ko mehsoos karte hue teen baar lambi saans lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye office mein karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Ye main kal office jate hi karunga. Jab bhi wo boss chilana shuru karega, main chupchap excuse leke washroom chala jaunga. Shayad isse pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan mein thodi kami aaye, aur main collapse hone se bach jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe validating that economic debt biologically drives somatic symptoms.
text: Bilkul, jab kisan credit card jaisi aarthik fikar lagatar dimag par haavi rehti hai, toh hamara sharir us stress ko directly marod aur thakan ke roop mein bahar nikalta hai; yeh jalan tumhara dosh nahi hai balki aarthik dabav ka asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main toh khud ko hi kos raha tha ki main mard hoke itna kamzor kaise pad raha hoon. Lekin aapne sahi kaha, body kitna hi jhelegi aakhir? Ye EMI ka pressure to bade bado ki himmat tod deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence behind his self-blame regarding his role as a man.
text: Khud ko kamzor manne ke piche shayad yehi purana darr chupa hota hai ki ek admi hote hue bhi tum parivaar ka udhaar uthane mein kahin piche na chhut jao.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar EMI sach mein bounce ho gayi toh mere baapu kya sochenge. Unhone ne badi umeed se mujhe yahan bheja tha. Unki muskaan aur bharosa todna mere liye maut se badhkar hoga isliye to yahan sab jhel raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his duty-based framing of tolerating the abuse for his father's dignity.
text: Pitaji ki umeedo par khara utarne ki tumhari sachi koshish aur unka bharosa banaye rakhne ka farz hi tumhare is poore sangharsh aur yahan ki taqleef jhelne ki sabse badi wajah hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unki izzat ke liye hi to. Agar ek bar loan clear ho jaye, to kam se kam theek se saans lene ki fursat to milegi. Abhi to har waqt bas calendar yaad rehta hai ki 5 tareekh aane wali hai aur emi deni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration frame of his continuous anxiety leading up to the 5th of the month.
text: Agle mahine ki paanch tareekh ka yeh countdown lagatar chalne se har ek din aaram ke bina bas kal ki fikar mein beetta nazar aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Us fikar ko main dimag se puri tarah to nikal nahi sakta bhaiya. Par aapne jo saans wala tareeka bataya usse kam se kam office mein sharir ko break to milega. Kal se ye chalu karunga pakka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer another small suggestion to break the morning anxiety habit.
text: Yeh soch bahut practical hai aur zaroor asar karegi. Iske sath hi, kya tum subah uthte hi turant bank app check karne ke bajaye, pehle 2 minute bas bina kuch soche baithne ki aadat daal sakte ho, taki din ki shuruwat darr se na ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main sach mein aankh khulte hi pehle bank ka balance hi check karta hoon roj. Aadat si ho gayi hai ghabrahat wali. Aise khali baithne ki aadat dalna asaan nahi hoga, par main try jaroor karunga kal subah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his willingness to try and break the anxiety loop, highlighting his inherent strength.
text: Subah ki ghabrahat bhari aadat ko badalne ki tumhari yeh koshish tumhari apni khud ki parwah ko darshati hai; ek aise mahaul mein jahan sab kuch paise aur kisto se napta hai, apne aap ko aaram dene ki pehel karna bohot himmat ka kaam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya bhai. Kabhi kisi ne is shehar mein itne thehrav se baat nahi ki. Yahan to sab paise ke peeche bhaag rahe hain. Aapse baat karke hi mera ye sharir jo kaanp raha tha, wo thoda shant ho gaya hai abhi ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational impact of feeling heard and physically calmer.
text: Is bhari anjaan bheed mein aakhir kisi ko apni puri baat bol kar aur sune jane ka ehsaas milne par andar ki wo ghabrahat thodi dheeli pad jana bahut bada aaraam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ab main akele nahi lad raha aisa lagta hai. Main kal se apni health par thoda dhyaan dunga, kyu ki agar main physically tut gaya to loan kon bharega, parivaar akele kaise sambhalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his proactive duty frame tying his physical health to his family's safety.
text: Baapu ke us udhaar aur parivaar ki dekhbhal ka farz tum utha rahe ho, aur isiliye ab khud ko thoda aaraam dena tumhare aur unke, dono ke behatar aage ke raste ke liye bahut zaroori ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Ekdum sahi baat. Ab mujhe lagta hai ki neend bhi thodi theek aayegi. Pura din us pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan se halat kharab thi, par abhi lag raha hai chhati pe se thoda bojh kam hua hai. Main thoda sohne jaunga ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the timeframe of relief arriving after a long day of physical distress.
text: Pure din bhar ka wo lagatar bhaari-pan aur takleef aakhir-kaar raat ke is waqt thodi thandi pad rahi hai, taki tum apne sharir ko kal ke liye sukoon de sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jee, agle din ki duty ke liye thoda aaram zaroori hai. Aapka bahut aabhar, jo mera dard bina mujhe chhota feel karaye suna aapne. Subh ratri bhai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close the session by affirming his resilience and effort to balance urban struggles with rural duties.
text: Apne sangharsh aur zimmedariyon ke beech bhi itni himmat juta kar baat karne ke liye aana aur naye kadam uthana, tumhari samajhdari ko dikhata hai; shanti se aaram karo aane wale kal ke liye, shubh ratri.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan chha gaya hai. Meeting mein meri capability par sawal uthaye gaye, tabhi se yeh halat hai. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain aur chit fund ka paisa bhi doob gaya, isi wajah se shaayad meri aankhon mein har waqt jalan aur neend ki kami rehti hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki metro city ki bheed mein chalne ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical sensation back to the Seeker to validate their somatic reality.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki sach mein aapke jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan baith gaya hai us meeting ke baad se.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Haan, yeh jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan jaata hi nahi. Office login karne ka time aate hi meri body kaanpne lagti hai. EMI aur rent ka soch kar dimaag blank ho jaata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the timeline and duration of the physical symptoms tied to work routine.
text: Roz subah login karne ke waqt se hi yeh physical thakan aur kaanpna aapko gher leta hai, khaaskar jab bills aur EMI samne khade hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Ek toh neend ki kami hai, upar se lagta hai meri saari hard work ka koi faayda nahi hua. Savings wipe out hone ke baad se, is metro city mein survive karna impossible lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the implied fear of not being able to survive or sustain life in the city.
text: Itni mehnat ke baad bhi sab kuch doob jaane ka darr satata hai, ki aage is badi metro city mein guzaara kaise chalega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Ghar walo ko bataya nahi hai abhi. Unko lagta hai beta metro mein well-settled hai. Agar unhe chit fund wale fraud ka pata chala, toh unka dil toot jayega. Mujhe bahut exhaustion feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed emotional exhaustion stemming from hiding the financial reality from family.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki family ki expectations aur is financial haqeeqat ko akele manage karte karte aap andar se poori tarah EXHAUSTED mehsoos kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele manage karna hi padega na. Main eldest son hoon. Par meri aankhon ki jalan aur back pain itna badh gaya hai ki screen par focus nahi hota. Koi samajhta nahi meri yeh halat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the isolation and burden of being the eldest son without pushing with a question, due to stigma cue.
text: Ghar ke bade bete hone ka bojh akele uthana padta hai, aur kisi se apni physical takleef baantne ki jagah bhi nahi milti...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kisi se kya bolun? Corporate world mein weakness dikhayi toh promotion gaya. Chit fund mein paise doobna meri apni bewakoofi thi. Upar se yeh metro isolation mujhe andar se kha raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalize the experience of financial scams in the IT sector and reduce shame.
text: Humare IT sector mein bahut logon ke saath financial scams ka yeh pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapke saath nahi hua, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki corporate image maintain karne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe ho. Par is image ko maintain karte karte mere jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan roz badhta ja raha hai. Ab kya karoon? Mujhe is physical pain aur stress se bahar aana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the chit fund loss as a systemic manipulation rather than personal foolishness.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki chit fund frauds aam logon ko manipulate karne ke liye hi design kiye jaate hain. Yeh system ka ek structural issue hai, aapki personal failure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rational level pe samajh aata hai, par EMI ka pressure toh real hai. Aur yeh jo neend ki kami hai usne meri productivity zero kar di hai. Mujhe abhi aage ka koi rasta dikhai nahi de raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable options to address the physical toll of continuous screen time and stress.
text: Is physical thakan ko todne ke liye hum do choti cheezein soch sakte hain—ya toh screen time ke beech har ek ghante mein 5 minute ka stretching break lijiye, ya phir raat ko sone se pehle 10 minute bilkul bina kisi digital device ke shanti se baithiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Stretching se shayad mera back pain thoda kam ho. Raat mein bina phone ke baithna impossible hai, dimaag aur zyada chalne lagta hai debts ke baare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, immediate step.
text: Pehle aaj laptop ke paas ek pani ki bottle rakh lijiye… phir jaise hi ek alarm baje, bas 5 minute ke liye apni chair se uth kar thoda stretch kariye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh doable lag raha hai. Pata nahi isse meri savings toh wapas nahi aayegi, par shayad screen par aankhon ki jalan thodi control ho jaye. Meeting mein thoda focus kar paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his willingness to take small steps for his health despite the overwhelming financial burden.
text: Is situation mein aisi choti koshish karna bhi bahut badi baat hai. Itne financial bojh ke bawajood apne health ke liye effort karna aapki asli himmat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas capability pe hi toh sawaal uthaya tha unhone. Mere boss ne meeting mein bola ki meri performance drop ho rahi hai. Main kya bataun unhe ki mere andar bilkul physical energy nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the fear of how declining performance due to exhaustion might be perceived by superiors.
text: Boss ki un baaton ko sun kar andar se darr lagta hai ki agar energy wapas nahi aayi toh job par asar pad sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Job gayi toh sab khatam. EMI default ho jayegi. Isiliye jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan mehsoos hota hai jab bhi appraisal ka khayal aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical sensation triggered by the fear of losing the job.
text: Jab job aur EMI ki uncertainty dimaag mein aati hai, toh sach mein wapas jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan ki halat ban jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main ek machine ban gaya hoon. Metro pakdo, office jao, laptop ke aage baitho. Ek aisi thakan hai jo rago mein bas gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the rigid, duty-bound role that feels mechanical and unforgiving.
text: Ek IT professional aur bete ka farz nibhate hue, aapne khud ko machine jaisa bana liya hai jiske paas aaram ka waqt hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Agar aaram kiya toh next mahine ka rent kaun dega? Ghar walo ko support bhi bhejna hota hai. Meri life ka bas yahi routine ban gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Contextualizing the dual burden of city life and family support as a structural issue for migrant professionals.
text: Metro cities mein aksar professionals par aisi dual financial responsibilities ka bahut bhaari dabaav hota hai, jo dheere dheere ek unbearable physical exhaustion mein badal jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unbearable toh ho hi gaya hai. Par ab is reality ke saath thoda theek hona padega. Main kal se apne desk par stretching pakka start karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his acceptance of the reality and commitment to physical relief.
text: Mujhe sach mein khushi hai ki aap is mushkil daur ko samajh karke apni physical health par dhyan dene ka yeh zaroori step le rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Thodi himmat toh mili hai. Kam se kam lag raha hai ki main is metro bheed mein apne struggle ke saath bilkul akela nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relief of finding connection in an otherwise isolating city environment.
text: Yeh baat sunkar rahat milti hai ki is badi anjaan seher ki bheed mein ab aapko pehle jaisa akelapan mehsoos nahi ho raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kaafi hadd tak rahat hai. Shayad aane wali meeting ka fear ab bhi hai, par body utni kaanp nahi rahi. Maine paani ki bottle bhi rakh li hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the somatic improvement as he implements the small action step.
text: Aapki body ab pehle ki tarah kaanp nahi rahi, yeh khud mein ek bahut accha physical badlaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Sahi kaha. Woh jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan thoda kam hua hai abhi ke liye. Dekhte hain aage office mein kya hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift in duration and intensity of the physical symptoms.
text: Aane wale office ke waqt ko ab aap bina us lagaatar physical heaviness ke face karne ki state mein lag rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: EMI aur chit fund ka loan abhi bhi mooh baaye khada hai, lekin main is tension ko apni body ko aur tabah nahi karne dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising the boundary he is setting between financial stressors and physical well-being.
text: Apne physical health ko financial stress se is tarah alag rakhne ki koshish karna aapki maturity aur inner himmat ka saboot hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka waqt dene ke liye bahut shukriya. Main koshish karunga ki choti choti stretching aur hydration maintain karun. Ab login karne ja raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his return to his duties with a stronger physical foundation.
text: Apni responsibility nibhaane ke liye wapas kaam par jaane se pehle, aapne khud ko physical level par ek solid shuruaat di hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai
text: Aaj meeting mein bezatti milne ke baad se mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai. Is bhari-pan aur sharir ki thakan ne meri metro mein survive karne ki kshamta hi khatam kar di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring exact body phrase as the initial invitation using Lens A.
text: Sun kar aisa lag raha hai ki sach mein gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai, aur haazme ke bigadne se sharir poori tarah thak chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahan shahar mein baith kar gaon ke bare mein sochta hoon toh pet mein ainth hone lagti hai. Babu ji ka phone aaya tha, sahukar unhe pareshan kar raha hai fasal kharab hone ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the timeframe and the physical reaction to the phone call using Lens D.
text: Jab se wahan gaon se unka phone aana shuru hua hai, tab se yeh sharir ka bhari-pan aur bechaini badh gayi lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Subah office mein boss ne target meet na karne par sabke saamne bezatti kar di. Wahan ki daant aur gaon ka karz dono soch kar meri saans atakne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question to explore how he is carrying the dual burden after two restatements.
text: In dono tarfa dabav ke chalte, jahan metro mein kaam ka bhaar hai aur wahan gaon mein udhaar, tum akele in sabko kaise jhel rahe ho har din?

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Tumhe shayad yeh fikar sata rahi hai ki agar unhe yahan ki asali mushkilo ka pata chal gaya, toh gaon walon ki bachi-khuchi umeed bhi toot jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Sharam aati hai bolne mein kisi ko. Roommate ko bhi nahi bata sakta, sochega ki kaisa kamzor gaon wala hai. Isiliye kisi se baat nahi karta, bas andar hi andar ghoot raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a short restatement ending in a soft pause using Lens C.
text: Akele mein is sharam ko logo se chupana aur sabse kaat kar rakhna bohot bhari lag raha hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi toh dimaag mein aata hai ki sab chhod-chhad ke kahin chala jaun. Pura din metro mein dhakke kha kar bhi sahukar ka karz utar nahi raha aur haazma bhi waise hi kharab rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the mild risk flag before mirroring the duty that keeps him tied down using Lens B.
text: Aise bojh mein sab kuch chhodne ka khayal aana bohot aam baat hai. Ek taraf bada beta hone ki zimmedari aur doosri taraf kaam ka pressure, tum inn dono farzo ko ek sath nibhane ki koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bada beta hone ki saza hi mil rahi hai shayad. Babu ji ne khet girvi rakh diya tha. Ab crop insurance tha nahi, aur fasal doob gayi. Main yahan aakar ek failure ban ke reh gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep unexpressed shame and helplessness he feels about not saving his family from the moneylender.
text: Lagta hai in sab ke beech, ghar walo ki zarurat puri na kar paane se aur gaon mein sahukar ki wajah se, tum khud ko bohot sharminda aur lachaar mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sharminda hi toh hoon. Office mein boss ki baatein aur raat mein udhaar ki yaad, dono ne milkar haazma bilkul bigad diya hai. Kuch khaya nahi jata theek se aaj kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shame as natural given the harsh reality for farmer families in the metro, separating his worth from the financial outcome.
text: Aise mahaul mein, jahan kisan parivaar se aane walo ko bina kisi support ke metro mein apna guzaara karna padta hai, wahan sharmindagi aur darr mehsoos karna laazmi hai; yeh karz tumhari mehnat ya izzat ko tay nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par babu ji ko toh lagta hai beta shahar mein hai, sab sambhal lega. Unhe kya pata yahan 12 ghante lagane ke baad bhi kharche nikalna kitna mushkil hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers hiding their reality to normalize his isolation.
text: Bahar gaon se aaye hue ladko mein apni sachai chupane ka dabaav bahut aam hai—mere jan-ne walo mein bhi kuch log aise fase the, par koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki shahar se wapas khali haath jaane ki badnami ka darr lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar khali hath lauta toh muh dikhane layag nahi rahunga. Aur yahan raha toh ye boss aur kharche maar dalenge. Tension se gardan mein itni akdan hai abhi bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feeling of being trapped between two unviable options using Lens C.
text: Ek taraf gaon wapas jaane par izzat ka darr, aur doosri taraf metro mein roz ka sangharsh, yeh donon milkar tumhe is pareshani ke beech mein fasa kar rakh rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pura bandha hua hi mehsoos karta hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main ab kya karoon ki yeh ainth aur chinta thodi kam ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the situation structurally to normalize the lack of insurance and heavy debt burden as a systemic failing.
text: Humare yahan fasal beema na hone par sahukar ka dabdaba aam kisan ke liye aise halaat paida karta hai jahan paisa chukana lagbhag na-mumkin ban jata hai; yeh poora hisaab chote logo ke khilaf hai, aur is bojh ko tumhara akele jhelna ek structural kami hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh toh mera hi hai na akhir. Mujhe bas is bechaini se bachna hai abhi kyunki agar bimar pad gaya toh naukri bhi jayegi. Koi raasta batao please.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering simple, non-intrusive grounding techniques to calm the body without adding new obligations.
text: Is thakan aur gardan ki takleef ko thoda shant karne ke liye hum do aasaan kadam utha sakte hain: ya toh 5 minute bina screen dekhe aaram se kursi par thehal kar saans lo, ya phir gaon se laayi koi cheez haath mein pakad kar do minute baitho. Kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Maa ne ek purana rumal diya tha. Usko pakad kar baithna shayad thoda theek lage aur himmat de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle apna phone side mein rakh do... phir us rumal ko thik se haathon mein pakad lo... aur aaram se thodi der uski aahat aur maa ki dua mehsoos karte hue saans lo... bas itna hi koshish karo aaj.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar raha hoon... sach mein thoda dhyaan us bezatti se hat raha hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing the loop on the physical relief using Lens A.
text: Us choti si cheez ko haath mein pakadne se, shayad us sakht gardan aur haazme ki jalan mein halki si shanti aur thehrav aa raha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thoda halka toh zaroor lag raha hai. Par kal subah phir wahi boss ke taane, aur sahukar ka pressure hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the anxiety of tomorrow returning using Lens E.
text: Aane wale kal ke darr se, tumhe yeh fikar sata rahi hai ki yeh bechaini kal phirse ushi tarah tum par haavi ho jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach hi hai. Main gaon mein mehnat karne se nahi darta tha, pata nahi kyun yahan itna sehma hua mehsoos karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming that his rural resilience is still intact, but the environment has just changed.
text: Tumhari mitti ki woh taqat aur thos mehnat ka jazba aaj bhi tumhare andar maujood hai, bas yahan metro ka tareeka bilkul naya aur akele jhelne wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akelapan toh hai yahan bohot. Gaon mein log sath the. Khair, is thakan ko toh roz sahna hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the missing community support using Lens C.
text: Tumhare apne gaon ka bhaichaara aur sabka aapas mein judaav hi tha, jo ab is shahar ke akelepan mein tumhe yaad aa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi. Ab mujhe agle hafte babu ji ko kuch paise bhejne ka intezaam karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the upcoming timeline and the pressure using Lens D.
text: Agle hafte ka intezaar aur un paise bhejne ki tayari ka dabaav tumhare dimag mein abhi se daudna shuru ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai
text: Karna toh padega. Main kal us rumal ke sath hi thoda khud ko shaant rakhunga. Warna aaj toh gardan mein itni akdan hai ki kaam par jana mushkil lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty to take care of his body to fulfill his role using Lens B.
text: Parivar ko aage badhane ke farz ko nibhane ke sath-sath, ab tum apne is sharir aur zaroorat ko samajhne ki bhi thodi koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Aaj yahan baat karke dimag kafi shant hua hai. Kal main naye tareeke se shuruaat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his readiness and leaving him feeling capable.
text: Ek nayi shuruaat ki tarah, khud ko sambhalne ka yeh kadam aur tumhara thehrav aane wale waqt mein tumhara bohot sath dega.
